page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Strelka calls somatic and germline small variants from mapped sequencing reads
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Strelka is an analysis package designed to detect somatic snvs and small indels from the aligned sequencing reads of matched tumor-normal samples.
